productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Formal Shoes
description: These formal shoes are the most fashionable way to to get formal with comfort. This pair of formal shoes from lee cooper is a fashion forward choice which will give all-day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal trousers, a full sleeve shirt and a coordinating belt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Lace-ups for a snug and customised Fit Diagonal stitch detailing on the forefoot Soft removable sock-liner for instep comfort and to accommodate an orthotic Branding embossed on the lateral side Mid-sole Shock absorbing EVA mid-sole Out-sole TPR out-sole with a stacked heel Textured, metallic toned grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Branding on the out-sole shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
